name: Meta Conversions API (CAPI) — Server-Side Tracking
description: Server-side conversion tracking for Meta ads. Receives conversion events from dealer websites (Lead, ViewContent, Schedule, Purchase), hashes PII per Meta requirements (SHA256), builds CAPI payload, and sends to Meta Graph API. Bypasses ad blockers for improved attribution and ad optimization. Dead letter queue for failed events.

nodes.name: Receive Conversion Event
nodes.purpose: Receives POST from dealer websites with conversion event data. Supports events: Lead, ViewContent, Schedule, Purchase, Contact, SubmitApplication, Search.

nodes.name: Parse Event
nodes.purpose: Extracts and validates event_name, user_data (email, phone, IP, UA, fbc, fbp cookies), and custom_data (vehicle info, value, currency) from the incoming POST body.

nodes.name: Hash PII
nodes.purpose: SHA256 hashes email and phone per Meta requirements. Normalizes email (lowercase, trim) and phone (digits only, adds country code 1 for 10-digit numbers). Passes through already-hashed values.

nodes.name: Build CAPI Payload
nodes.purpose: Formats the full Meta Conversions API payload with data[] array, constructs the Graph API URL with pixel ID and access token from env vars. Validates at least one user_data field is present.

nodes.name: Send to Meta CAPI
nodes.purpose: POST to Meta Graph API v19.0 /{PIXEL_ID}/events. Retries 3x with 5s wait on failure. 30s timeout.

nodes.name: Log Success
nodes.purpose: Logs successful event submission with Meta response details (events_received, fbtrace_id). Returns success response to webhook caller.

nodes.name: Log Failure — Dead Letter
nodes.purpose: Dead letter queue for events that fail after 3 retries. Stores original payload in workflow static data (capped at 100 entries) for manual replay. Returns error response to caller.

environment_variables.META_PIXEL_ID: Your Meta Pixel ID from Events Manager
environment_variables.META_ACCESS_TOKEN: System User access token from Meta Business Manager with ads_management permission

integration_example.description: POST this JSON to the webhook endpoint from your dealer website
